steps.title: Find the cube volume
steps.content:
For a cube, volume is the side length cubed. The edge length is $0.70$ meter.
$$V=(0.70)^3=0.343$$

steps.title: Multiply by density
steps.content:
Mass equals density times volume.
$$926\cdot0.343=317.618$$
Rounded to the nearest whole number, this is $318$.
The answer is A.
